papers.title: Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition
papers.abstract: Introduces residual learning to make very deep convolutional networks easier to optimize, and reports strong image-classification and CIFAR-10 results with substantially deeper models.
verified_from: arXiv search result
paper title and author match verified via web search

papers.title: Deep Compression: Compressing Deep Neural Networks with Pruning, Trained Quantization and Huffman Coding
papers.abstract: Presents a three-stage compression pipeline based on pruning, quantization, and Huffman coding to reduce neural-network storage and improve deployment efficiency without materially hurting accuracy.
verified_from: arXiv search result
paper title and author match verified via web search

papers.title: BranchyNet: Fast Inference via Early Exiting from Deep Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Adds side-branch classifiers to deep networks so easy examples can exit early, reducing inference time and energy while preserving strong accuracy on datasets including CIFAR-10.
verified_from: arXiv search result
paper title and author match verified via web search

papers.title: Multi-Scale Dense Networks for Resource Efficient Image Classification
papers.abstract: Studies classification under test-time resource limits and proposes a multi-scale dense architecture with early exits for anytime and budgeted batch prediction.
verified_from: arXiv search result
paper title and author match verified via web search

papers.title: Adaptive Computation Time for Recurrent Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Introduces a differentiable mechanism that lets recurrent networks adapt how much computation they spend on each input, providing a foundational view of input-dependent computation.
verified_from: arXiv search result
paper title and author match verified via web search

papers.title: Selective Classification for Deep Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Adapts selective classification to deep neural networks by explicitly trading coverage for risk, giving a principled backdrop for confidence-based decision rules.
verified_from: arXiv search result
paper title and author match verified via web search

papers.title: SkipNet: Learning Dynamic Routing in Convolutional Networks
papers.abstract: Learns to skip convolutional blocks on a per-input basis using a hybrid supervised and reinforcement-learning training strategy for dynamic routing.
verified_from: arXiv search result
paper title and author match verified via web search

papers.title: BlockDrop: Dynamic Inference Paths in Residual Networks
papers.abstract: Uses reinforcement learning to choose which residual blocks to execute at inference time, learning input-specific computation paths for efficient recognition.
verified_from: arXiv search result
paper title and author match verified via web search

papers.title: Dynamic Neural Networks: A Survey
papers.venue: IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence
papers.abstract: Surveys dynamic neural networks that adapt structure or parameters to inputs, organizing the field around instance-wise, spatial-wise, and temporal-wise adaptive computation.
verified_from: arXiv search result
TPAMI DOI corroborated via web search

papers.title: Green AI
papers.abstract: Argues that AI evaluation should report efficiency and resource cost alongside quality metrics, framing computational footprint as a first-class research concern.
verified_from: arXiv search result
paper title and author match verified via web search

papers.title: Learning Multiple Layers of Features from Tiny Images
papers.abstract: Introduces the CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100 image classification datasets and presents baseline feature-learning experiments on tiny natural images.
